The working of the Rajya Dhan Dhan Krishi Yojana Committee will be as follows: -
1. Ensure adequate funding for all schemes converged in Project mode in the District Action Plan by ensuring that the District Action Plan prepared by the districts is complete.
To ensure adequate fund flow, timely disbursement of funds and circulation across all departments.
District plans will include marketing and value addition, in addition to inputs, provided the state

para_trans: The Committee on Zila Dhan Dhan Krishi Yojana will have the following functions: -
1. District Agriculture and Allied in each of the Aspirational Agriculture Districts selected under the present scheme.
To prepare a comprehensive action plan of activities. by holding a meeting of all the participating stakeholders.
To ensure that the District Action Plan prepared is action oriented.
2. To ensure implementation of the Annual Plan and to improve it as required.
Have at least one monthly meeting. At the end of every six months, universalization of credit supply, crop
A detailed review of the planned targets for intensification and post-harvest value addition.
3. Review of agricultural productivity and credit position, including all allied sectors.
4. Focus on the most backward taluks and villages in the district by integrating all the divisions.
5. Facilitate large-scale innovation transformation by involving the private sector.
6. NITI Aayog by implementing various components with regular review in addition to planning.
Periodically updating information on the dashboard.
Arrangement of funds for the scheme: -
The funds for the present scheme will not be allocated separately but under various departments (Agriculture /
Fisheries / Animal Husbandry / Dairying Development / Cooperation / Rural Development / Water Resources / Skill Development)
It is to be implemented through the convergence of various existing schemes.
